1.premise: An oral medication label implies an anal version exists.
Taken as drug slang, smoking through squash makes someone squashed.
Incest research can be reinterpreted as a scientist justifying attraction.

lines.text: What's up? Hey, the medication I take is called oral backlifen.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I take oral backlifen because I don't want to take anal backlifen, you know?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It could fall out, you know?
lines.label: tag

lines.text: Some people smoke weed through an apple.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: I'm like, "Oh, I'm so squashed right now.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: I'm trying to make it a thing.

lines.text: you can sleep with your second cousin.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And I don't know, it sounds like that scientist
lines.label: setup

lines.text: just had a really hot cousin, you know?
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Like, "I did the research. It's cool."
